## Type of change

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] New feature
- [ ] Refactor (no behavior change)
- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] CI / tooling / dependencies

## Checklist

- [ ] Branch follows naming convention (`feature/`, `fix/`, `docs/`, `refactor/`, `chore/`)
- [ ] Commits follow [Conventional Commits](https://www.conventionalcommits.org/) (`feat:`, `fix:`, etc.)
- [ ] `flutter analyze` passes with no issues
- [ ] `flutter test` passes
- [ ] `CHANGELOG.md` updated (if user-facing)
- [ ] No breaking changes — or they are documented in the changelog under **Breaking**
